topic: Celtics game recap — wicked good win

turns.content: BRO did you see the celtics last night that was the most insane finish ive seen all year
I don't have real-time access to game results, but I can tell from your energy that it must have been a wild one! What happened? Walk me through the ending.
ok so were down by 6 with like 2 minutes left and tatum just goes off hits back to back threes and then jaylen brown gets a steal and dunks it to put us up one with 15 seconds left it was unreal

That sounds absolutely electric. Back-to-back threes from Tatum when you're down 6 is the definition of clutch, and then Brown sealing it with a steal and dunk? That's the kind of sequence that makes you jump off the couch. Did the other team have a shot at the end or was it locked up?
they got a shot off but it rimmed out and everyone at the bar went CRAZY bro I almost spilled my drink all over the dude next to me

There's nothing like watching a game like that in a packed bar -- when that final shot rims out and the whole place erupts, that's pure sports energy. The near-drink-spill is basically a badge of honor at that point. Were you watching with your usual crew?
nah it was just me and danny we were at the bar down the street from our place in southie just grabbed some food and watched the game on a monday night nothin crazy

Sometimes a low-key Monday night game with a buddy turns into the best sports night of the month just because the game delivers. Those are the ones you remember. Tatum and Brown really showed up when it mattered.
bro tatum is a top 5 player in the league rn and I dont wanna hear any arguments about it the man shows up every single time

After a performance like that it's hard to argue against him honestly. His ability to take over in crunch time is elite -- not every star player can flip that switch when you're down 6 with two minutes left. The combination of him and Brown is one of the best duos in the league right now.
facts dude I keep tellin people celtics are runnin it back this year nobody in the east can touch us when were locked in like that

When the Celtics are clicking on both ends they're terrifying to play against. The depth, the defense, and having two guys who can take over a game like Tatum and Brown -- that's a championship formula. If they keep playing like that in the clutch, the East is theirs to lose.

dude im just sayin if danny and I had a bigger tv this wouldve been even crazier to watch like watchin it at the bar was cool but imagine that finish on like a 65 inch at home I woulda been jumpin off the walls

Ha, honestly a finish like that hits different no matter the screen size, but I hear you -- a big screen setup for playoff time would be unreal. At least at the bar you had the crowd energy though. Hard to replicate an entire bar losing it when that shot rims out.
exactly bro alright I gotta get to work but I had to tell someone about that game it was wicked good
Glad you shared it, that sounds like it was an incredible finish. Go Celtics! Have a good one at work.
